title: Carol Lay
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Carol Lay''' (born [[1950s|1952]]) is a comic artist who lettered the [[Star Wars (1977) 6|sixth issue]] of [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel's ''Star Wars'']] series. That issue, the climax of the comic adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|the original ''Star Wars'' film]], was reprinted in numerous collections. Lay's early comic work appeared in the underground publishers like [[Wikipedia:Last Gasp|Last Gasp]] and [[Wikipedia:Rip Off Press|Rip Off Press]] in the 1970s. In [[1950s|1992]] she created her ''Story Minute'' strip, which appeared in daily and weekly papers around the world.

{{Artist-stub}}
